name: Large Energy Companies (Germany)
description: Large energy and utility companies with 5,000+ employees in Germany.

tam.description: Global cloud services for energy and utilities
tam.source: LLM estimate based on Gartner and IDC cloud-in-energy market reports (2025)

sam.description: Cloud and managed IT services for large German energy companies
sam.source: LLM estimate: ~20 large energy/utility companies in Germany (E.ON, RWE, EnBW, Vattenfall DE, Uniper scale), combined IT outsourcing and cloud spend ~EUR 2.8B

som.description: 6 customers x EUR 2M ACV in 3 years
som.source: Bottom-up: ~15 addressable large energy companies in Germany; T-Systems can realistically win 6 accounts in 3 years at EUR 2M average ACV (sovereign cloud + SAP on cloud + managed hyperscaler bundle) = EUR 12M
